summary: Iteration 2 UI changes tested successfully. All 5 features verified and working: (1) LibraryCard full-width photo layout, (2) Student Home search bar, (3) Owner Home library listing with search, (4) Owner Dashboard with Seat Manager button, (5) Seat Manager dynamic grid, (6) Owner Library fully functional edit form. No blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ LibraryCard component: Full-width photo (160px height) positioned at top with bookmark and Open badge overlays, details section below with proper spacing
✓ Student Home: Search bar with testID='home-search-bar' positioned at top, tappable, navigates to search tab
✓ Owner Home: Shows library listing (same as Student Home) with search bar testID='owner-search-bar', library cards with full-width photos

✓ Owner Dashboard: Stats cards (Total/Vacant/Occupied) with color-coded borders, occupancy bar with percentage, big Seat Manager button with testID='open-seat-manager-btn', revenue chart, student list

✓ Seat Manager: Total seats input (testID='total-seats-input'), Generate Grid button (testID='generate-grid-btn'), dynamic FlatList grid with 8 columns, SeatBox components with color coding (green=available, red=booked), Available/Booked count cards, Save button (testID='save-seats-btn'), regenerate functionality working (tested with 50 seats)

✓ Owner Library: Edit button (testID='edit-library-btn'), edit mode toggles fields from Text to TextInput, facilities become tappable chips in edit mode, Save (testID='save-library-btn') and Cancel (testID='cancel-edit-btn') buttons appear/disappear correctly, field editing works, cancel restores original values
✓ All testID attributes present for critical interactive elements
✓ Mobile-first design maintained with proper touch targets and spacing
✓ KeyboardAvoidingView used in Seat Manager and Owner Library for better mobile UX
✓ State management working correctly (useState, useMemo for seat counts)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - app continues to use existing dummy data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 changes all verified. LibraryCard now has full-width photo on top (was side-by-side before). Student and Owner Home both have search bars at top. Owner Dashboard has big Seat Manager button that opens /owner/seat-manager screen with dynamic grid generation. Owner Library has fully functional edit form with Save/Cancel buttons. All features working perfectly.

test_1_student_home.search_bar: ✓ Search bar visible at top with testID='home-search-bar', placeholder 'Search by name or area...'
test_1_student_home.library_card_layout: ✓ Full-width photo (160px height) on top with bookmark icon and Open badge, details below (name, address, distance, seats, fee, WhatsApp button)

test_2_owner_home.library_listing: ✓ Shows library cards (same as Student Home) with 'Libraries Near You' and 'All Libraries' sections
test_2_owner_home.search_bar: ✓ Search bar visible at top with testID='owner-search-bar', placeholder 'Search libraries...'

test_3_owner_dashboard.stats_cards: ✓ Three stat cards visible: Total (80), Vacant (15), Occupied (65) with color-coded left borders
test_3_owner_dashboard.occupancy_bar: ✓ Occupancy bar showing '81% occupied' with orange progress bar
test_3_owner_dashboard.seat_manager_button: ✓ Big orange Seat Manager button with testID='open-seat-manager-btn', icon, title, subtitle, and chevron
test_3_owner_dashboard.revenue_section: ✓ 'This Month's Revenue' showing ₹24,000 with bar chart for Mon-Sun
test_3_owner_dashboard.student_list: ✓ 'Currently in Library' section with student cards showing avatar, name, goal, seat number, time

test_4_seat_manager.total_seats_input: ✓ Input field with testID='total-seats-input', default value 80, accepts numbers 1-500
test_4_seat_manager.generate_grid_button: ✓ Button with testID='generate-grid-btn', generates new grid when clicked
test_4_seat_manager.seat_grid: ✓ FlatList with 8 columns, SeatBox components, color-coded (green=available, red=booked)
test_4_seat_manager.legend: ✓ Shows 'Total: X Seats' with Available (green dot) and Booked (red dot) legend
test_4_seat_manager.count_cards: ✓ Two cards showing Available count (green) and Booked count (red)
test_4_seat_manager.save_button: ✓ Save button with testID='save-seats-btn' at bottom
test_4_seat_manager.regenerate_functionality: ✓ Changed total to 50, clicked Generate Grid, grid updated to 50 seats (all green/available)

test_5_owner_library_edit.edit_button: ✓ Edit Library button with testID='edit-library-btn' visible at bottom in view mode
test_5_owner_library_edit.edit_mode_activation: ✓ Clicking Edit button changes Text components to TextInput, makes facilities tappable
test_5_owner_library_edit.save_cancel_buttons: ✓ Save (testID='save-library-btn') and Cancel (testID='cancel-edit-btn') buttons appear in edit mode
test_5_owner_library_edit.editable_fields: ✓ 8 input fields found: Library Name, Full Address, Area/City, Total Seats, WhatsApp Number, Open Time, Half Time Fee, Full Time Fee
test_5_owner_library_edit.facilities_section: ✓ Facilities section visible with tappable chips (AC, WiFi, CCTV, Drinking Water, Washroom, Locker, Newspaper, Personal Cabin, Silence Zone, Printing, Power Backup)
test_5_owner_library_edit.field_editing: ✓ Successfully edited Library Name from 'The Study Point Library' to 'The Study Point Library EDITED'
test_5_owner_library_edit.cancel_functionality: ✓ Clicking Cancel exits edit mode, restores original values, Edit button returns
